item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I don't think this logically works, but maybe I am being dense. Non-documentary physical evidence is apparently unaffected. Astronomical timekeeping is apparently unaffected. I think people would notice if the DPRK's physical artifacts are all actually only a year old or that stellar positions are all off by a year.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
I haven't seen very many other articles in which the Foundation is concerned with keeping history on its original course specifically.

It's the core concept of SCP-3780.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: Unfortunately, this article conflicts heavily with my understanding of Foundation canon. I haven't seen very many other articles in which the Foundation is concerned with keeping history on its original course specifically. As long as the veil isn't broken and humanity at large is unharmed, there are very few other people who would believe that the Foundation would bother trying to rewrite history like this. The mass amnestization of the entire world population just to put a few civil wars and political scandals in their rightful place, despite there being nothing inherently important to keeping history intact, doesn't fit.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
Wound up skimming. -1 Went crosseyed reading the same sentences and missed sections.

Concept of the Charitable trying to make world peace by making people forget their grudges is quite good. Letting it get out of control and ending the world is also good. But I didn't like your execution.

edit: deleted worthess advice

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: There's a broken footnote in the second iteration, otherwise, I fairly enjoyed it.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
you know when newbies come into 17 desperately seeking the passcode but it turns out they just didn't read the guide right



this is that

>:|

item.title: Author Post
item.content:encoded:
I wrote this for the 4kcon contest, got told it had issues, and gave up. I think I fixed some issues. Enjoy my first SCP. No idea whether it'll be here this time next week, so have fun with it!

Can't remember who critted, but I do know that Weryllium, Hippo, Captain Kirby and Dr Chandra and maybe Aers helped? And thanks to rounder for list pages guide.

If this somehow sticks around I will professionalise this post. Maybe.
